__description: Product catalog. Structure mirrors teammate's real GIAO FARA shop data from mock_data.json. Each entry serves two purposes: (a) description_for_rag → ChromaDB product_col for RAG; (b) all other fields → operational/analytics dashboard. Multiple entries may share the same product_id (variants differ by variant_id). seed_demo.py deduplicates by product_id before inserting into ChromaDB.

catalog_info.product_id: <string: e.g. P001 — shared across variants of same product>
catalog_info.variant_id: <string: unique per variant, e.g. V00101 — upsert key in merge.py>
catalog_info.name: <string: full display name>
catalog_info.industry_category: <string: optional — e.g. 'Mỹ phẩm & Trang điểm' (present in new.json products)>

dynamic_attributes.<key>: <string|int: product-specific attribute, e.g. skin_type, finish, pieces>

products.description_for_rag: <string: natural-language paragraph for ChromaDB. Include: product name, brand, category, key features/ingredients, skin type or use case, price, warranty, compatibility notes. Written in Vietnamese, 3–5 sentences.>
